code_block:
# Multi-stage build using Bun and Nginx
FROM oven/bun:1-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app

# Copy lockfile and package.json to cache dependency install stage
COPY bun.lock package.json ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile

# Copy the rest of the application files and build the production bundle
COPY . .
RUN bun run build

# Production serving stage
FROM oven/bun:1-alpine

# Create a dedicated non-root system user for safety
RUN addgroup -S appgroup && adduser -S appuser -G appgroup

WORKDIR /app
COPY bun.lock package.json ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile
COPY --chown=appuser:appgroup . .
RUN bun run build

EXPOSE 4173

# Switch to non-root user
USER appuser

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=10s --retries=3 \
  CMD bun -e "fetch('http://localhost:4173').then(r => r.ok ? process.exit(0) : process.exit(1)).catch(() => process.exit(1))"

CMD ["bun", "run", "preview", "--", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "4173"]

code_block:
# Stage 1: Builder
FROM ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:python3.13-alpine AS builder
ENV UV_COMPILE_BYTECODE=1 UV_LINK_MODE=copy
WORKDIR /app

# Install dependencies first for Docker caching
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.cache/uv \
    --mount=type=bind,source=uv.lock,target=uv.lock \
    --mount=type=bind,source=pyproject.toml,target=pyproject.toml \
    uv sync --frozen --no-install-project --no-dev

# Copy source and sync the rest
COPY . /app
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.cache/uv \
    uv sync --frozen --no-dev

# Stage 2: Final runtime image
FROM python:3.13-alpine

# Create a dedicated non-root system user for safety
RUN addgroup -S appgroup && adduser -S appuser -G appgroup

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the environment from the builder and set ownership
COPY --from=builder --chown=appuser:appgroup /app /app

# Add the virtual environment's bin to the path
ENV PATH="/app/.venv/bin:$PATH"
ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1

EXPOSE 8082

# Switch to non-root user
USER appuser

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=10s --retries=3 \
  CMD python -c "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://localhost:8082/api/health')" || exit 1

CMD ["uvicorn", "app.main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "8082"]

code_block:
# Stage 1: Build the frontend
FROM oven/bun:1-alpine AS frontend-builder
WORKDIR /app/frontend
COPY frontend/package.json frontend/bun.lock ./
RUN bun install --frozen-lockfile
COPY frontend/ ./
RUN bun run build

# Stage 2: Final combined image
FROM python:3.13-slim

WORKDIR /app

# Install system dependencies (nginx, supervisor, curl, unzip for bun)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    nginx \
    supervisor \
    curl \
    unzip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# ── Non-root user setup ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Create a dedicated non-root system user for running all services.
# Port 8080 > 1024 so no root binding privilege is required.
RUN groupadd --system --gid 1001 appgroup \
 && useradd --system --uid 1001 --gid appgroup --no-create-home appuser

# Install Bun globally
ENV BUN_INSTALL=/usr/local
RUN curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash

# Install uv for Python
COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:latest /uv /uvx /bin/

# Configure Nginx — set worker user and fix runtime directories
RUN rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default
COPY nginx.single.conf /etc/nginx/sites-available/default
RUN ln -s /etc/nginx/sites-available/default /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default \
 && sed -i "s|^user .*;|user appuser appgroup;|" /etc/nginx/nginx.conf || true \
 && mkdir -p /var/log/nginx /var/lib/nginx/body /run/nginx \
 && chown -R appuser:appgroup \
      /var/log/nginx \
      /var/lib/nginx \
      /run/nginx \
      /etc/nginx/sites-available \
      /etc/nginx/sites-enabled

# Copy Backend and sync dependencies
WORKDIR /app/backend
COPY backend/ .
RUN uv sync

# Copy Frontend and production dependencies
WORKDIR /app/frontend
COPY frontend/package.json frontend/bun.lock ./
RUN bun install --production --frozen-lockfile
COPY --from=frontend-builder /app/frontend /app/frontend

# Setup Supervisor
WORKDIR /app
COPY supervisord.conf /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf
RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor \
 && chown -R appuser:appgroup /app /var/log/supervisor /etc/supervisor

# Switch to non-root user for all subsequent commands and at runtime
USER appuser

EXPOSE 8080

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=60s --retries=3 \
  CMD curl -f http://localhost:8080/api/health || exit 1

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]

# Port 8080 > 1024 so no root binding privilege is required.
RUN groupadd --system --gid 1001 appgroup \
 && useradd --system --uid 1001 --gid appgroup --no-create-home appuser

# Install Bun globally
ENV BUN_INSTALL=/usr/local
RUN curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash

# Install uv for Python
COPY --from=ghcr.io/astral-sh/uv:latest /uv /uvx /bin/

# Configure Nginx — set worker user and fix runtime directories
RUN rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default
COPY nginx.single.conf /etc/nginx/sites-available/default
RUN ln -s /etc/nginx/sites-available/default /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default \
 && sed -i "s|^user .*;|user appuser appgroup;|" /etc/nginx/nginx.conf || true \
 && mkdir -p /var/log/nginx /var/lib/nginx/body /run/nginx \
 && chown -R appuser:appgroup \
      /var/log/nginx \
      /var/lib/nginx \
      /run/nginx \
      /etc/nginx/sites-available \
      /etc/nginx/sites-enabled

# Copy Backend and sync dependencies
WORKDIR /app/backend
COPY backend/ .
RUN uv sync

# Copy Frontend and production dependencies
WORKDIR /app/frontend
COPY frontend/package.json frontend/bun.lock ./
RUN bun install --production --frozen-lockfile
COPY --from=frontend-builder /app/frontend /app/frontend

# Setup Supervisor
WORKDIR /app
COPY supervisord.conf /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf
RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor \
 && chown -R appuser:appgroup /app /var/log/supervisor /etc/supervisor

# Switch to non-root user for all subsequent commands and at runtime
USER appuser

EXPOSE 8080

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=5s --start-period=60s --retries=3 \
  CMD curl -f http://localhost:8080/api/health || exit 1

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]

code_block:
test-frontend:
    name: 🧪 Frontend Tests (Vitest)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Bun
        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
        with:
          bun-version: latest

      - name: Install dependencies
        working-directory: frontend
        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile

      - name: Run Vitest tests
        working-directory: frontend
        run: bun run test

  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  # JOB 2 — Backend Unit Tests (Pytest + SQLite in-memory)
  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  test-backend-unit:
    name: 🧪 Backend Unit Tests (Pytest)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install uv
        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
        with:
          version: latest

      - name: Setup Python 3.13
        run: uv python install 3.13

      - name: Install backend dependencies
        working-directory: backend
        run: uv sync --all-groups

      - name: Run unit tests
        working-directory: backend
        run: |
          PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/ -v -W ignore \
            --tb=short \
            --junit-xml=test-results/unit.xml

      - name: Upload unit test results
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: backend-unit-test-results
          path: backend/test-results/unit.xml

  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  # JOB 3 — Backend Integration Tests (Pytest + real PostgreSQL 16)
  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  test-backend-integration:
    name: 🔗 Backend Integration Tests (Postgres)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [test-frontend, test-backend-unit]

    services:
      postgres:
        image: postgres:16-alpine
        env:
          POSTGRES_USER: postgres
          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: postgres
          POSTGRES_DB: postgres
        ports:
          - 5432:5432
        options: >-
          --health-cmd "pg_isready -U postgres"
          --health-interval 5s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 10

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install uv
        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
        with:
          version: latest

      - name: Setup Python 3.13
        run: uv python install 3.13

      - name: Install backend dependencies
        working-directory: backend
        run: uv sync --all-groups

      - name: Wait for PostgreSQL to be ready
        run: |
          until pg_isready -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres; do
            echo "Waiting for postgres..."; sleep 2
          done

      - name: Run integration tests
        working-directory: backend
        env:
          DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres
        run: |
          PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests_integration/ -v -W ignore \
            --tb=short \
            --junit-xml=test-results/integration.xml

      - name: Upload integration test results
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: backend-integration-test-results
          path: backend/test-results/integration.xml

  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  # JOB 4 — Deploy to AWS ECS Fargate (only on push to main, all tests must pass)
  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  deploy:
    name: 🚀 Deploy to AWS ECS Fargate
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [test-frontend, test-backend-unit, test-backend-integration]
    # Only deploy on direct pushes to main — not on PRs
    if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'

    env:
      AWS_REGION: ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }}
      ECR_REPOSITORY: global-tracker
      ECS_CLUSTER: global-tracker-cluster
      ECS_SERVICE: global-tracker-service
      CONTAINER_NAME: global-tracker-app

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Configure AWS credentials
        uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          aws-access-key-id: ${{ secrets.AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID }}
          aws-secret-access-key: ${{ secrets.AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}
          aws-region: ${{ secrets.AWS_REGION }}

      - name: Login to Amazon ECR
        id: login-ecr
        uses: aws-actions/amazon-ecr-login@v2

      - name: Build, tag, and push Docker image to ECR
        id: build-image
        env:
          ECR_REGISTRY: ${{ steps.login-ecr.outputs.registry }}
          IMAGE_TAG: ${{ github.sha }}
        run: |
          # Build with both the git SHA tag and latest
          docker build -t $ECR_REGISTRY/$ECR_REPOSITORY:$IMAGE_TAG \
                       -t $ECR_REGISTRY/$ECR_REPOSITORY:latest .
          docker push $ECR_REGISTRY/$ECR_REPOSITORY:$IMAGE_TAG
          docker push $ECR_REGISTRY/$ECR_REPOSITORY:latest
          echo "image=$ECR_REGISTRY/$ECR_REPOSITORY:$IMAGE_TAG" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Download current ECS task definition
        run: |
          aws ecs describe-task-definition \
            --task-definition global-tracker \
            --query taskDefinition \
            > task-definition.json

      - name: Inject new image into task definition
        id: task-def
        uses: aws-actions/amazon-ecs-render-task-definition@v1
        with:
          task-definition: task-definition.json
          container-name: ${{ env.CONTAINER_NAME }}
          image: ${{ steps.build-image.outputs.image }}

      - name: Deploy updated task definition to ECS
        uses: aws-actions/amazon-ecs-deploy-task-definition@v2
        with:
          task-definition: ${{ steps.task-def.outputs.task-definition }}
          service: ${{ env.ECS_SERVICE }}
          cluster: ${{ env.ECS_CLUSTER }}
          wait-for-service-stability: true

code_block:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Hantavirus Global Tracker API
  description: |
    This specification outlines the RESTful API for the Hantavirus Global Tracker. 
    It supports real-time geospatial outbreak mapping, historical trend tracking, public news aggregation, and evidence-based prevention guidelines.
  version: 1.0.0
  contact:
    name: CLUE-BDI Team
    url: https://github.com/CLUE-BDI/global-tracker-spark
servers:
  - url: /api
    description: Local or relative API gateway endpoint
  - url: http://localhost:8082/api
    description: Development backend server

tags:
  - name: Outbreaks
    description: Operations related to active outbreak surveillance zones and case metrics
  - name: News
    description: Epimediological updates, scientific research articles, and public health advisories
  - name: Trends
    description: Multi-year historical case metrics segmented by continental regions
  - name: Prevention
    description: Evidence-based health mitigation and rodent control guidelines
  - name: Sources
    description: Institutional metadata and links to trusted public health agencies

paths:
  # ==========================================
  # OUTBREAKS ENDPOINTS
  # ==========================================
  /outbreaks:
    get:
      tags:
        - Outbreaks
      summary: Retrieve all active outbreak surveillance zones
      description: Returns a complete list of geographic coordinates, case metrics, strain info, and severity ratings for all active monitoring sites.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: A successful list of outbreak locations
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/OutbreakLocation'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    post:
      tags:
        - Outbreaks
      summary: Add a new outbreak surveillance zone
      description: Registers a new outbreak location with coordinates, case/death tallies, and severity assessment.
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/OutbreakLocationInput'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Surveillance zone registered successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/OutbreakLocation'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  /outbreaks/{id}:
    parameters:
      - name: id
        in: path
        required: true
        description: Unique identifier of the outbreak zone (typically a two-character country code or slug)
        schema:
          type: string
          example: us
    get:
      tags:
        - Outbreaks
      summary: Fetch an outbreak surveillance zone by ID
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Outbreak details retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/OutbreakLocation'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    put:
      tags:
        - Outbreaks
      summary: Update metrics for an existing outbreak zone
      description: Modifies case counts, deaths, severity level, or other metadata for a given zone.
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/OutbreakLocationInput'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Outbreak metrics updated successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/OutbreakLocation'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    delete:
      tags:
        - Outbreaks
      summary: Remove an outbreak surveillance zone
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Surveillance zone deleted successfully
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  # ==========================================
  # NEWS & ADVISORIES ENDPOINTS
  # ==========================================
  /news:
    get:
      tags:
        - News
      summary: Retrieve all news items and advisories
      description: Returns a aggregated list of news cards, scientific updates, and alerts from WHO, CDC, etc.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: A list of news items
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/NewsItem'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    post:
      tags:
        - News
      summary: Publish a new advisory or news item
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/NewsItemInput'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: News item created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/NewsItem'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  /news/{id}:
    parameters:
      - name: id
        in: path
        required: true
        description: Unique identifier of the news item
        schema:
          type: string
          example: n1
    get:
      tags:
        - News
      summary: Fetch a news item by ID
      responses:
        '200':
          description: News item details retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/NewsItem'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    put:
      tags:
        - News
      summary: Update a news item
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/NewsItemInput'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: News item updated successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/NewsItem'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    delete:
      tags:
        - News
      summary: Delete a news item
      responses:
        '204':
          description: News item deleted successfully
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  # ==========================================
  # ANNUAL TRENDS ENDPOINTS
  # ==========================================
  /trends:
    get:
      tags:
        - Trends
      summary: Fetch multi-year trend points
      description: Returns aggregate counts across Americas, Europe, and Asia for horizontal progress comparison.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of regional annual trends
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/TrendPoint'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    post:
      tags:
        - Trends
      summary: Add a new annual trend record
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TrendPoint'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Trend point recorded successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/TrendPoint'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  /trends/{year}:
    parameters:
      - name: year
        in: path
        required: true
        description: 4-digit calendar year
        schema:
          type: string
          example: "2025"
    get:
      tags:
        - Trends
      summary: Fetch trends for a specific year
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Trend metrics for the requested year
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/TrendPoint'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    put:
      tags:
        - Trends
      summary: Edit annual trend metrics
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TrendPoint'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Trend metrics updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/TrendPoint'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    delete:
      tags:
        - Trends
      summary: Delete an annual trend record
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Record deleted
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  # ==========================================
  # PREVENTION ENDPOINTS
  # ==========================================
  /prevention:
    get:
      tags:
        - Prevention
      summary: Retrieve prevention tips
      description: Returns medical and environmental sanitation recommendations, categorizable by camping, household safety, cleanup, or travel.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Array of evidence-based prevention guidelines
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreventionTip'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    post:
      tags:
        - Prevention
      summary: Submit a new prevention tip
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreventionTipInput'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Tip recorded successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreventionTip'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  /prevention/{id}:
    parameters:
      - name: id
        in: path
        required: true
        description: Unique identifier of the guideline card
        schema:
          type: string
          example: p1
    get:
      tags:
        - Prevention
      summary: Get a prevention tip by ID
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Guideline details retrieved
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreventionTip'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    put:
      tags:
        - Prevention
      summary: Modify a prevention tip
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreventionTipInput'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Tip modified
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreventionTip'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    delete:
      tags:
        - Prevention
      summary: Delete a prevention tip
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Guideline removed
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  # ==========================================
  # TRUSTED SOURCES ENDPOINTS
  # ==========================================
  /sources:
    get:
      tags:
        - Sources
      summary: List all trusted data sources
      description: Returns metadata links (WHO, CDC, ECDC, PAHO) mapping to external public health agencies.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of authoritative sources
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Source'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    post:
      tags:
        - Sources
      summary: Register a new trusted data source
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/Source'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Source metadata registered
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Source'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  /sources/{name}:
    parameters:
      - name: name
        in: path
        required: true
        description: Unique name of the institution
        schema:
          type: string
          example: "WHO Disease Outbreak News"
    get:
      tags:
        - Sources
      summary: Fetch a trusted source by name
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Institution metadata details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Source'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    put:
      tags:
        - Sources
      summary: Edit trusted source details
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/Source'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Source details updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Source'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    delete:
      tags:
        - Sources
      summary: Remove a trusted source record
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Record removed
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

components:
  # ==========================================
  # ENUMS AND SUB-SCHEMAS
  # ==========================================
  schemas:
    Severity:
      type: string
      description: Assessment level of cases and transmissibility
      enum:
        - low
        - moderate
        - high
        - critical
      example: high

    # ==========================================
    # OUTBREAK SCHEMAS
    # ==========================================
    OutbreakLocationInput:
      type: object
      required:
        - country
        - region
        - lat
        - lng
        - cases
        - deaths
        - strain
        - severity
        - lastUpdate
      properties:
        country:
          type: string
          description: Sovereign nation housing the active zone
          example: United States
        region:
          type: string
          description: State, province, or geopolitical territory monitored
          example: Four Corners
        lat:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: Latitude coordinate of the map pin center
          example: 37.0
        lng:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: Longitude coordinate of the map pin center
          example: -109.0
        cases:
          type: integer
          description: Cumulative confirmed cases
          example: 864
        deaths:
          type: integer
          description: Cumulative confirmed deaths
          example: 304
        strain:
          type: string
          description: Particular hantavirus variant detected
          example: Sin Nombre (SNV)
        severity:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Severity'
        lastUpdate:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: Calendar date of latest update
          example: "2025-04-12"

    OutbreakLocation:
      allOff:
        - $ref: '#/components/schemas/OutbreakLocationInput'
      type: object
      required:
        - id
        - country
        - region
        - lat
        - lng
        - cases
        - deaths
        - strain
        - severity
        - lastUpdate
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: Unique database record identifier
          example: us
        country:
          type: string
          example: United States
        region:
          type: string
          example: Four Corners
        lat:
          type: number
          example: 37.0
        lng:
          type: number
          example: -109.0
        cases:
          type: integer
          example: 864
        deaths:
          type: integer
          example: 304
        strain:
          type: string
          example: Sin Nombre (SNV)
        severity:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Severity'
        lastUpdate:
          type: string
          example: "2025-04-12"

    # ==========================================
    # NEWS SCHEMAS
    # ==========================================
    NewsItemInput:
      type: object
      required:
        - tag
        - source
        - date
        - title
        - url
        - excerpt
      properties:
        tag:
          type: string
          enum:
            - outbreak
            - research
            - advisory
            - update
          description: Classification tag for advisory feeds
          example: outbreak
        source:
          type: string
          description: Institutional source origin
          example: PAHO
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
          example: "2025-05-02"
        title:
          type: string
          example: "PAHO Epidemiological Update: Hantavirus in Patagonia"
        url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          example: "https://www.paho.org/en/epidemiological-alerts-updates"
        excerpt:
          type: string
          description: Short summary of the article body
          example: Argentina reports cluster of confirmed ANDV cases in Epuyen with person-to-person transmission concerns.

    NewsItem:
      allOff:
        - $ref: '#/components/schemas/NewsItemInput'
      type: object
      required:
        - id
        - tag
        - source
        - date
        - title
        - url
        - excerpt
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          example: n1
        tag:
          type: string
          example: outbreak
        source:
          type: string
          example: PAHO
        date:
          type: string
          example: "2025-05-02"
        title:
          type: string
          example: "PAHO Epidemiological Update: Hantavirus in Patagonia"
        url:
          type: string
          example: "https://www.paho.org/en/epidemiological-alerts-updates"
        excerpt:
          type: string
          example: Argentina reports cluster of confirmed ANDV cases in Epuyen with person-to-person transmission concerns.

    # ==========================================
    # TREND SCHEMAS
    # ==========================================
    TrendPoint:
      type: object
      required:
        - year
        - americas
        - europe
        - asia
      properties:
        year:
          type: string
          description: Year calendar identifier
          example: "2025"
        americas:
          type: integer
          description: Total cases recorded across North and South America
          example: 423
        europe:
          type: integer
          description: Total cases recorded across Europe (primarily Puumala)
          example: 3200
        asia:
          type: integer
          description: Total cases recorded across Asian countries (primarily Hantaan)
          example: 1890

    # ==========================================
    # PREVENTION SCHEMAS
    # ==========================================
    PreventionTipInput:
      type: object
      required:
        - category
        - title
        - description
      properties:
        category:
          type: string
          enum:
            - home
            - outdoor
            - cleanup
            - travel
          example: home
        title:
          type: string
          example: Seal Entry Points
        description:
          type: string
          example: Close gaps and holes inside and outside your home larger than 6mm to keep rodents out.

    PreventionTip:
      allOff:
        - $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreventionTipInput'
      type: object
      required:
        - id
        - category
        - title
        - description
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          example: p1
        category:
          type: string
          example: home
        title:
          type: string
          example: Seal Entry Points
        description:
          type: string
          example: Close gaps and holes inside and outside your home larger than 6mm to keep rodents out.

    # ==========================================
    # SOURCES SCHEMAS
    # ==========================================
    Source:
      type: object
      required:
        - name
        - url
        - description
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          example: WHO Disease Outbreak News
        url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          example: https://www.who.int/emergencies/disease-outbreak-news
        description:
          type: string
          example: Official global outbreak alerts

    # ==========================================
    # ERROR RESPONSE STRUCTURES
    # ==========================================
    ErrorResponse:
      type: object
      required:
        - status
        - message
      properties:
        status:
          type: integer
          description: HTTP status code
          example: 400
        message:
          type: string
          description: Readable explanation of the error
          example: Invalid input body payload supplied.
        error:
          type: string
          description: Error class name or technical summary
          example: ValidationException

  # ==========================================
  # REUSABLE RESPONSE PARAMETERS
  # ==========================================
  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: The request payload was invalid or syntactically incorrect.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'
          example:
            status: 400
            message: "Missing required property: country"
            error: "ValidationException"
    NotFound:
      description: The requested resource could not be located in the database.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'
          example:
            status: 404
            message: "Surveillance zone with ID 'nonexistent' was not found"
            error: "ResourceNotFoundException"
    InternalServerError:
      description: An unhandled exception or data ingestion pipeline failure occurred on the server.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'
          example:
            status: 500
            message: "An internal server error occurred while rendering the data query."
            error: "DatabaseConnectionException"

code_block:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Hantavirus Global Tracker API
  description: |
    This specification outlines the RESTful API for the Hantavirus Global Tracker. 
    It supports real-time geospatial outbreak mapping, historical trend tracking, public news aggregation, and evidence-based prevention guidelines.
  version: 1.0.0
  contact:
    name: CLUE-BDI Team
    url: https://github.com/CLUE-BDI/global-tracker-spark
servers:
  - url: /api
    description: Local or relative API gateway endpoint
  - url: http://localhost:8082/api
    description: Development backend server

tags:
  - name: Outbreaks
    description: Operations related to active outbreak surveillance zones and case metrics
  - name: News
    description: Epimediological updates, scientific research articles, and public health advisories
  - name: Trends
    description: Multi-year historical case metrics segmented by continental regions
  - name: Prevention
    description: Evidence-based health mitigation and rodent control guidelines
  - name: Sources
    description: Institutional metadata and links to trusted public health agencies

paths:
  # ==========================================
  # OUTBREAKS ENDPOINTS
  # ==========================================
  /outbreaks:
    get:
      tags:
        - Outbreaks
      summary: Retrieve all active outbreak surveillance zones
      description: Returns a complete list of geographic coordinates, case metrics, strain info, and severity ratings for all active monitoring sites.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: A successful list of outbreak locations
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/OutbreakLocation'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    post:
      tags:
        - Outbreaks
      summary: Add a new outbreak surveillance zone
      description: Registers a new outbreak location with coordinates, case/death tallies, and severity assessment.
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/OutbreakLocationInput'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Surveillance zone registered successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/OutbreakLocation'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  /outbreaks/{id}:
    parameters:
      - name: id
        in: path
        required: true
        description: Unique identifier of the outbreak zone (typically a two-character country code or slug)
        schema:
          type: string
          example: us
    get:
      tags:
        - Outbreaks
      summary: Fetch an outbreak surveillance zone by ID
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Outbreak details retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/OutbreakLocation'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    put:
      tags:
        - Outbreaks
      summary: Update metrics for an existing outbreak zone
      description: Modifies case counts, deaths, severity level, or other metadata for a given zone.
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/OutbreakLocationInput'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Outbreak metrics updated successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/OutbreakLocation'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    delete:
      tags:
        - Outbreaks
      summary: Remove an outbreak surveillance zone
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Surveillance zone deleted successfully
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  # ==========================================
  # NEWS & ADVISORIES ENDPOINTS
  # ==========================================
  /news:
    get:
      tags:
        - News
      summary: Retrieve all news items and advisories
      description: Returns a aggregated list of news cards, scientific updates, and alerts from WHO, CDC, etc.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: A list of news items
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/NewsItem'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    post:
      tags:
        - News
      summary: Publish a new advisory or news item
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/NewsItemInput'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: News item created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/NewsItem'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  /news/{id}:
    parameters:
      - name: id
        in: path
        required: true
        description: Unique identifier of the news item
        schema:
          type: string
          example: n1
    get:
      tags:
        - News
      summary: Fetch a news item by ID
      responses:
        '200':
          description: News item details retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/NewsItem'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    put:
      tags:
        - News
      summary: Update a news item
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/NewsItemInput'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: News item updated successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/NewsItem'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    delete:
      tags:
        - News
      summary: Delete a news item
      responses:
        '204':
          description: News item deleted successfully
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  # ==========================================
  # ANNUAL TRENDS ENDPOINTS
  # ==========================================
  /trends:
    get:
      tags:
        - Trends
      summary: Fetch multi-year trend points
      description: Returns aggregate counts across Americas, Europe, and Asia for horizontal progress comparison.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of regional annual trends
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/TrendPoint'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    post:
      tags:
        - Trends
      summary: Add a new annual trend record
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TrendPoint'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Trend point recorded successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/TrendPoint'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  /trends/{year}:
    parameters:
      - name: year
        in: path
        required: true
        description: 4-digit calendar year
        schema:
          type: string
          example: "2025"
    get:
      tags:
        - Trends
      summary: Fetch trends for a specific year
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Trend metrics for the requested year
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/TrendPoint'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    put:
      tags:
        - Trends
      summary: Edit annual trend metrics
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TrendPoint'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Trend metrics updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/TrendPoint'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    delete:
      tags:
        - Trends
      summary: Delete an annual trend record
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Record deleted
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  # ==========================================
  # PREVENTION ENDPOINTS
  # ==========================================
  /prevention:
    get:
      tags:
        - Prevention
      summary: Retrieve prevention tips
      description: Returns medical and environmental sanitation recommendations, categorizable by camping, household safety, cleanup, or travel.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Array of evidence-based prevention guidelines
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreventionTip'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    post:
      tags:
        - Prevention
      summary: Submit a new prevention tip
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreventionTipInput'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Tip recorded successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreventionTip'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  /prevention/{id}:
    parameters:
      - name: id
        in: path
        required: true
        description: Unique identifier of the guideline card
        schema:
          type: string
          example: p1
    get:
      tags:
        - Prevention
      summary: Get a prevention tip by ID
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Guideline details retrieved
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreventionTip'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    put:
      tags:
        - Prevention
      summary: Modify a prevention tip
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreventionTipInput'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Tip modified
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreventionTip'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    delete:
      tags:
        - Prevention
      summary: Delete a prevention tip
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Guideline removed
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  # ==========================================
  # TRUSTED SOURCES ENDPOINTS
  # ==========================================
  /sources:
    get:
      tags:
        - Sources
      summary: List all trusted data sources
      description: Returns metadata links (WHO, CDC, ECDC, PAHO) mapping to external public health agencies.
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of authoritative sources
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Source'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    post:
      tags:
        - Sources
      summary: Register a new trusted data source
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/Source'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Source metadata registered
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Source'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

  /sources/{name}:
    parameters:
      - name: name
        in: path
        required: true
        description: Unique name of the institution
        schema:
          type: string
          example: "WHO Disease Outbreak News"
    get:
      tags:
        - Sources
      summary: Fetch a trusted source by name
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Institution metadata details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Source'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    put:
      tags:
        - Sources
      summary: Edit trusted source details
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/Source'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Source details updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Source'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'
    delete:
      tags:
        - Sources
      summary: Remove a trusted source record
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Record removed
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
        '500':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/InternalServerError'

components:
  # ==========================================
  # ENUMS AND SUB-SCHEMAS
  # ==========================================
  schemas:
    Severity:
      type: string
      description: Assessment level of cases and transmissibility
      enum:
        - low
        - moderate
        - high
        - critical
      example: high

    # ==========================================
    # OUTBREAK SCHEMAS
    # ==========================================
    OutbreakLocationInput:
      type: object
      required:
        - country
        - region
        - lat
        - lng
        - cases
        - deaths
        - strain
        - severity
        - lastUpdate
      properties:
        country:
          type: string
          description: Sovereign nation housing the active zone
          example: United States
        region:
          type: string
          description: State, province, or geopolitical territory monitored
          example: Four Corners
        lat:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: Latitude coordinate of the map pin center
          example: 37.0
        lng:
          type: number
          format: float
          description: Longitude coordinate of the map pin center
          example: -109.0
        cases:
          type: integer
          description: Cumulative confirmed cases
          example: 864
        deaths:
          type: integer
          description: Cumulative confirmed deaths
          example: 304
        strain:
          type: string
          description: Particular hantavirus variant detected
          example: Sin Nombre (SNV)
        severity:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Severity'
        lastUpdate:
          type: string
          format: date
          description: Calendar date of latest update
          example: "2025-04-12"

    OutbreakLocation:
      allOff:
        - $ref: '#/components/schemas/OutbreakLocationInput'
      type: object
      required:
        - id
        - country
        - region
        - lat
        - lng
        - cases
        - deaths
        - strain
        - severity
        - lastUpdate
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: Unique database record identifier
          example: us
        country:
          type: string
          example: United States
        region:
          type: string
          example: Four Corners
        lat:
          type: number
          example: 37.0
        lng:
          type: number
          example: -109.0
        cases:
          type: integer
          example: 864
        deaths:
          type: integer
          example: 304
        strain:
          type: string
          example: Sin Nombre (SNV)
        severity:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Severity'
        lastUpdate:
          type: string
          example: "2025-04-12"

    # ==========================================
    # NEWS SCHEMAS
    # ==========================================
    NewsItemInput:
      type: object
      required:
        - tag
        - source
        - date
        - title
        - url
        - excerpt
      properties:
        tag:
          type: string
          enum:
            - outbreak
            - research
            - advisory
            - update
          description: Classification tag for advisory feeds
          example: outbreak
        source:
          type: string
          description: Institutional source origin
          example: PAHO
        date:
          type: string
          format: date
          example: "2025-05-02"
        title:
          type: string
          example: "PAHO Epidemiological Update: Hantavirus in Patagonia"
        url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          example: "https://www.paho.org/en/epidemiological-alerts-updates"
        excerpt:
          type: string
          description: Short summary of the article body
          example: Argentina reports cluster of confirmed ANDV cases in Epuyen with person-to-person transmission concerns.

    NewsItem:
      allOff:
        - $ref: '#/components/schemas/NewsItemInput'
      type: object
      required:
        - id
        - tag
        - source
        - date
        - title
        - url
        - excerpt
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          example: n1
        tag:
          type: string
          example: outbreak
        source:
          type: string
          example: PAHO
        date:
          type: string
          example: "2025-05-02"
        title:
          type: string
          example: "PAHO Epidemiological Update: Hantavirus in Patagonia"
        url:
          type: string
          example: "https://www.paho.org/en/epidemiological-alerts-updates"
        excerpt:
          type: string
          example: Argentina reports cluster of confirmed ANDV cases in Epuyen with person-to-person transmission concerns.

    # ==========================================
    # TREND SCHEMAS
    # ==========================================
    TrendPoint:
      type: object
      required:
        - year
        - americas
        - europe
        - asia
      properties:
        year:
          type: string
          description: Year calendar identifier
          example: "2025"
        americas:
          type: integer
          description: Total cases recorded across North and South America
          example: 423
        europe:
          type: integer
          description: Total cases recorded across Europe (primarily Puumala)
          example: 3200
        asia:
          type: integer
          description: Total cases recorded across Asian countries (primarily Hantaan)
          example: 1890

    # ==========================================
    # PREVENTION SCHEMAS
    # ==========================================
    PreventionTipInput:
      type: object
      required:
        - category
        - title
        - description
      properties:
        category:
          type: string
          enum:
            - home
            - outdoor
            - cleanup
            - travel
          example: home
        title:
          type: string
          example: Seal Entry Points
        description:
          type: string
          example: Close gaps and holes inside and outside your home larger than 6mm to keep rodents out.

    PreventionTip:
      allOff:
        - $ref: '#/components/schemas/PreventionTipInput'
      type: object
      required:
        - id
        - category
        - title
        - description
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          example: p1
        category:
          type: string
          example: home
        title:
          type: string
          example: Seal Entry Points
        description:
          type: string
          example: Close gaps and holes inside and outside your home larger than 6mm to keep rodents out.

    # ==========================================
    # SOURCES SCHEMAS
    # ==========================================
    Source:
      type: object
      required:
        - name
        - url
        - description
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          example: WHO Disease Outbreak News
        url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          example: https://www.who.int/emergencies/disease-outbreak-news
        description:
          type: string
          example: Official global outbreak alerts

    # ==========================================
    # ERROR RESPONSE STRUCTURES
    # ==========================================
    ErrorResponse:
      type: object
      required:
        - status
        - message
      properties:
        status:
          type: integer
          description: HTTP status code
          example: 400
        message:
          type: string
          description: Readable explanation of the error
          example: Invalid input body payload supplied.
        error:
          type: string
          description: Error class name or technical summary
          example: ValidationException

  # ==========================================
  # REUSABLE RESPONSE PARAMETERS
  # ==========================================
  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: The request payload was invalid or syntactically incorrect.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'
          example:
            status: 400
            message: "Missing required property: country"
            error: "ValidationException"
    NotFound:
      description: The requested resource could not be located in the database.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'
          example:
            status: 404
            message: "Surveillance zone with ID 'nonexistent' was not found"
            error: "ResourceNotFoundException"
    InternalServerError:
      description: An unhandled exception or data ingestion pipeline failure occurred on the server.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse'
          example:
            status: 500
            message: "An internal server error occurred while rendering the data query."
            error: "DatabaseConnectionException"
